name: Black Scryer Underling

sheet.name: Black Scryer Underling
sheet.background_story:
Following my master's orders  I stayed at the Crow's Den waiting. 

Now, seeking revenge, my master leads us to the Coven's Lair to thwart the ritual.

Surviving The Black Scryer's failed attempt to assasinate The Crow, the underling searched The Roost for some weapon, or treasure, or power that could save his master or turn their fate...

...he found The Crow's Pet instead
